name: kbridge-four-bar-importer
description: KinematicBridge Step-0 isolation, Run A. KinematicImporter ALONE at doc=cm (its native unit). PRIMARY preview is the imported mechanism geometry at rest (Mechanism out 1 → Custom Preview); a separate Animate(Time) scrub layer (contrasting tint) lets the Inventor animation be scrubbed independently. The importer is cm-only (it scales transforms but not its STEP geometry), so cm is required; at mm the parts jumble. Confirms the importer renders one recognizable four-bar at correct scale. Slop fixture: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/four-bar-importer.canary.slop.json. Requires the KinematicImporter .gha loaded in the Rhino instance.

setup.vlmDescription: A four-bar linkage assembled from solid CAD parts shown shaded in a single Rhino viewport: a base/housing plus three connecting links forming one closed loop. The parts read as a single recognizable mechanism at a consistent scale — none wildly oversized or undersized, not scattered far apart, and not collapsed into an unreadable overlapping cluster.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: Solid shaded four-bar CAD parts forming one recognizable closed-loop mechanism at consistent scale (no scatter, no unreadable cluster).
